CurrentIssues.ID: ComplexCondition:JsonLibraryParser.kt$JsonLibraryParser.LibraryTransformingSerializer$first is JsonObject && ("questions" in first || "items" in first || "stem" in first || "question" in first)

LongParameterList:XlsxImageResolver.kt$XlsxImageResolver$( drawingDoc: Document, localName: String, drawingRelMap: Map<String, String>, zipFile: ZipFile, pathCache: MutableMap<String, String>, addressImages: MutableMap<String, String>, rowImages: MutableMap<Int, String>, )
MaxLineLength:ImportLibraryManager.kt$ImportLibraryManager$"Ignoring targetBookId=$targetBookId because targetQuizId=$targetQuizId belongs to bookId=${targetQuiz.bookId}."

MaxLineLength:ImportLibraryManager.kt$ImportLibraryManager$"This import contains plain HTTP image URLs. They will not be downloaded unless you explicitly allow insecure image downloads in the review dialog."
MaxLineLength:ImportLibraryManager.kt$ImportLibraryManager$warnings.add(ImportWarning("Quiz '${quizDto.title}' cover image import warning: $warning", affectedId = quizDto.id))
MaxLineLength:JsonLibraryParser.kt$JsonLibraryParser.LibraryTransformingSerializer$// Handle cases where options are objects but might use "value" or "content" instead of "text"
MaxLineLength:JsonLibraryParser.kt$JsonLibraryParser.LibraryTransformingSerializer$val textVal = oMap["text"] ?: oMap["value"] ?: oMap["content"] ?: oMap["answer"] ?: JsonPrimitive("")

MaxLineLength:JsonLibraryParser.kt$JsonLibraryParser.LibraryTransformingSerializer$var correct = questMap["correct"] ?: questMap["answer"] ?: questMap["correctAnswers"] ?: questMap["solution"] ?: questMap["correct_index"]

MaxLineLength:KnowledgeRepository.kt$KnowledgeRepository$promptText = "<system_role>You are an expert learning designer.</system_role>
<instructions>Convert the core concepts from the provided material into concise, high-yield spaced-repetition flashcards.
Follow these rules:
1. Make the front of the card a clear, unambiguous question or cloze deletion.
2. Keep the back of the card concise and to the point.
3. Provide an optional brief hint to aid recall.
Output strictly in JSON format as an array of objects with keys: "front", "back", "hint".</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:KnowledgeRepository.kt$KnowledgeRepository$promptText = "<system_role>You are an expert technical writer and educator.</system_role>
<instructions>Synthesize the provided material into a highly structured, comprehensive, yet easy-to-digest study blueprint.
Format the output in Markdown with the following sections:
- **Core Summary**: A brief 2-3 sentence overview.
- **Key Concepts**: Bulleted list of the most important takeaways.
- **Detailed Breakdown**: A structured analysis with subheadings.
- **Common Pitfalls / Mistakes to Avoid**: What students usually get wrong about this.
- **Review Cues**: Short questions to test memory.</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:KnowledgeRepository.kt$KnowledgeRepository$promptText = "<system_role>You are an expert test creator and medical educator.</system_role>
<instructions>Analyze the provided material and generate 3 to 5 high-quality, challenging multiple-choice questions.
Ensure that:
1. The stem is clinically relevant or focuses on key conceptual understanding.
2. There are 4-5 plausible options.
3. The correct answer is unambiguously correct.
4. A detailed rationale/explanation is provided for why the correct answer is right and why the distractors are wrong.
Output strictly in JSON format as an array of objects with keys: "question", "options" (array of strings), "answer" (string), "explanation" (string).</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:KnowledgeRepository.kt$KnowledgeRepository$promptText = "<system_role>You are an expert tutor in {relevant_speciality}.</system_role>
<instructions>Please explain the following question part: {part_to_explain}.

Here is the full question context:
{question}</instructions>"
MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$"A comprehensive hub inside a book to manage its quizzes, flashcard decks, slideshow courses, note blueprints, and AI prompt decks"
MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$"Use its specialized player interface (such as note autoscroll/TTS) or convert it to another format (like transforming a quiz into flashcards)"
MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$"Use the Explanation button during study, or run templates in the Prompts tab, connected to cloud APIs or a local Ollama server"
MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$"استخدام واجهة المشغل الخاصة بها (مثل القراءة الصوتي والتمرير التلقائي للمقالات) أو تحويلها لتشكيل آخر (كتحويل كوز إلى بطاقات مراجعة)"
MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$"مركز متكامل داخل الكتاب لإدارة الكوزات، والبطاقات المراجعة، والشرائح التعليمية، ومقالات الملاحظات، وبرومبتات الذكاء الاصطناعي"

MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$body = "The Solar System consists of the Sun and everything that orbits it, including eight planets. Mars is often called the Red Planet due to iron oxide on its surface."

MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$explanation = "MKS allows you to generate explanations during quizzes or draft custom materials from the Prompts tab, using either cloud APIs or a local Ollama server."
MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$explanation = "You can customize colors, fonts, and layout density by heading to the Settings screen and choosing Appearance/Theme."

MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$explanation = "You can get additional books by navigating to the 'Contact Us' section and requesting them. This is a temporary setup as the app is still under active development."

MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$explanation = "You can import supported files (like XLSX or CSV) via the Library's Import tool, or by sharing the file from another app and choosing MKS as the destination."

MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$explanation = "You can study materials through specialized players (like the blueprint reader with autoscroll/TTS) or convert them (e.g., turning quiz questions into flashcards)."

MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$explanation = "يمكنك الاستيراد إما من داخل التطبيق عبر خيار الاستيراد بالمكتبة، أو بمشاركة ملف مدعوم (مثل XLSX/CSV) من أي تطبيق خارجي واختيار MKS عبر نظام مشاركة أندرويد."

MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$explanation = "يمكنك التفاعل مع الذكاء الاصطناعي عبر زر الشرح داخل الكوزات أو من خلال لوحة البرومبتات، مع دعم الربط بنماذج سحابية أو خادم محلي يعمل على Ollama."

MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$explanation = "يمكنك الحصول على الكتب من خلال خانة 'اتصل بنا' وطلبها مباشرة من المطور. هذه الحالة مؤقتة نظراً لأن التطبيق ما زال في مرحلة التطوير."

MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$explanation = "يمكنك دراسة كل مادة عبر المشغل المخصص لها (كقارئ المقالات وخاصية القراءة التلقائية) أو بتحويلها مثل تحويل الكوزات إلى بطاقات مراجعة لتنويع أساليب الدراسة."
MaxLineLength:MksDatabaseSeeder.kt$MksDatabaseSeeder$explanation = "ينظم تطبيق MKS المواد المعرفية في هيئة اختبارات (Quizzes)، بطاقات مراجعة، شرائح عرض، وملاحظات أو مقالات (Blueprints)."
MaxLineLength:MksExchangeV7Archive.kt$MksExchangeV7Archive$source.startsWith("http://", ignoreCase = true) || source.startsWith("https://", ignoreCase = true) || source.startsWith("media/") -> null

MaxLineLength:SearchIndexManager.kt$SearchIndexManager$execInsert(ann.noteBody ?: ann.selectedText ?: "Annotation", ann.ownerType, ann.selectedText ?: "", "ANNOTATION", ann.id.toString(), book.workspaceId, ann.bookId, 0, ann.ownerId, ann.updatedAt)

MaxLineLength:SearchIndexManager.kt$SearchIndexManager$execInsert(deck.title, deck.description ?: "", deck.tags.joinToString(" "), "PROMPT_DECK", deck.id.toString(), book.workspaceId, book.id, 0, 0, deck.updatedAt)

MaxLineLength:SearchIndexManager.kt$SearchIndexManager$execInsert(quiz.title, quiz.description ?: "", quiz.category ?: "", "QUIZ", quiz.id.toString(), book.workspaceId, book.id, quiz.id, 0, quiz.updatedAt)
MaxLineLength:SearchIndexManager.kt$SearchIndexManager$execInsert(slide.title, course.title, slide.body ?: "", "SLIDE", slide.id.toString(), book.workspaceId, book.id, 0, course.id, slide.updatedAt)
MaxLineLength:SearchIndexManager.kt$SearchIndexManager$execInsert(src.title, src.author ?: "", src.description ?: "", "SOURCE", src.id.toString(), book.workspaceId, book.id, 0, 0, src.updatedAt)

MaxLineLength:SpreadsheetHeaderMapper.kt$SpreadsheetHeaderMapper$"answer" to listOf("answer", "answers", "ans", "an", "correct", "key", "correct answer", "answer key", "correct_option", "back", "الإجابة", "الجواب", "مفتاح الإجابة", "الوجه الخلفي")

MaxLineLength:SpreadsheetHeaderMapper.kt$SpreadsheetHeaderMapper$"question" to listOf("question", "question summary", "question text", "q text", "question_text", "q", "stem", "rephrased stem", "question stem", "text", "front", "السؤال", "سؤال", "نص السؤال", "نص", "الوجه الأمامي")

MaxLineLength:SpreadsheetHeaderMapper.kt$SpreadsheetHeaderMapper$"reference" to listOf("reference", "ref", "source", "chapter q", "ch q", "chapter_q", "ch_q", "q#", "question number", "citation", "مرجع", "reference text")
